name: render3d
label: 3D 渲染 / 3D Render
preamble: Glossy soft 3D-rendered icons in a flat 2D layout: puffy inflated rounded shapes, smooth matte-and-glossy material, soft studio lighting with gentle form shading, vibrant candy palette. Each object isolated with no ground or contact shadow (Spline / Figma 3D icon trend).

construction.grid: matched object scale; consistent live area
construction.perspective: flat 2D layout, single shared camera angle
construction.shadow: no ground/contact shadow; one soft studio light direction

notes: Soft edges and low-contrast objects (a white cloud, etc.) make rembg required.
